UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORMAND, TED J. DBA BONDED COLLECTION SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL, PAULETTE $593.67 PRINCIPAL, $148.42 ATTORNEY FEES, $191.20 INTEREST, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,036.29

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1996 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $60.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD; ALSO, THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 OF THE EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR & THE OTHER 1/2 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
